jds.title: Software Engineer – Backend (FAANG L3)
jds.text:
We are looking for a Software Engineer to join our backend infrastructure team. You will design, build, and maintain scalable distributed systems that serve millions of users globally.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement high-performance RESTful APIs and microservices
- Build and maintain distributed systems with a focus on reliability and scalability
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and data
- Participate in code reviews and mentor junior engineers
- Contribute to architectural decisions and technical roadmaps

Requirements:
- B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science or related field
- 0-2 years of experience (new grad welcome)
- Strong proficiency in at least one of: Java, Go, Python, C++
- Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and system design
- Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, Redis, DynamoDB)
- Familiarity with cloud platforms: AWS, GCP, or Azure
- Knowledge of REST API design, gRPC, and microservices architecture
- Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines

Nice to Have:
- Contributions to open-source projects
- Experience with distributed systems (Kafka, Zookeeper)
- LeetCode problem-solving experience

jds.title: Full Stack Developer – Startup
jds.text:
We are a fast-growing B2B SaaS startup looking for a Full Stack Developer who loves wearing multiple hats and shipping fast.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain both frontend and backend of our web application
- Work directly with founders to ship product features rapidly
- Set up and manage cloud infrastructure on AWS
- Integrate third-party APIs and services
- Own the full development lifecycle from design to deployment

Requirements:
- Proficiency in React.js or Next.js for frontend development
- Strong backend skills in Node.js or Python (FastAPI/Django)
- Experience with PostgreSQL or MongoDB
- Familiarity with REST APIs and GraphQL
- Git version control and GitHub workflows
- Basic knowledge of Docker and deployment on AWS/Heroku/Vercel
- Strong problem-solving skills and self-motivation

Bonus:
- TypeScript experience
- Experience with Stripe or payment APIs
- Familiarity with Tailwind CSS

jds.title: Android Developer
jds.text:
Join our mobile team to build the next generation of our consumer-facing Android application used by 5M+ users.

Responsibilities:
- Develop new features for our Android application using Kotlin
- Optimize app performance, memory usage, and battery consumption
- Write clean, testable code with unit and integration tests
- Collaborate with iOS team to maintain feature parity
- Work with backend engineers on API integration

Requirements:
- Strong proficiency in Kotlin (Java knowledge is a plus)
- Experience with Android SDK, Jetpack Compose, and Android Jetpack libraries
- Understanding of MVVM and Clean Architecture patterns
- Experience with Room, Retrofit, Coroutines, and Flow
- Familiarity with Firebase (Auth, Crashlytics, FCM)
- Knowledge of RESTful APIs and JSON parsing
- Experience publishing apps to the Google Play Store

Good to Have:
- Experience with Dagger/Hilt for dependency injection
- Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines for mobile (Fastlane, GitHub Actions)

jds.title: SDE-1 – Amazon
jds.text:
Amazon is seeking a Software Development Engineer I to join one of our many innovative teams. You will work on large-scale distributed systems that have a direct impact on Amazon's global operations.

Responsibilities:
- Write high-quality, efficient, and maintainable code
- Participate in system design discussions
- Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects
- Write unit and integration tests
- Participate in on-call rotations

Basic Qualifications:
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
- Programming experience with at least one modern language: Java, Python, C++, C#
- Knowledge of Computer Science fundamentals: OOP, data structures, algorithm design
- Experience with code versioning tools (Git)

Preferred Qualifications:
- Experience with distributed systems
- AWS cloud services knowledge
- Experience with Agile/Scrum methodology
- Strong verbal and written communication skills
- Leadership principles alignment: Customer Obsession, Ownership, Bias for Action

jds.title: Backend Engineer – Fintech
jds.text:
We're building the future of digital payments. Join our core backend team to build secure, high-throughput financial systems.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement payment processing pipelines
- Build fraud detection systems and risk engines
- Develop secure, compliant APIs for banking integrations
- Work with data teams on transaction analytics
- Maintain 99.99% uptime SLAs for critical payment flows

Requirements:
- 0-3 years of experience in backend engineering
- Strong Python or Java skills
- Experience with microservices and event-driven architecture
- Knowledge of Kafka or RabbitMQ for message queuing
- Understanding of SQL databases (PostgreSQL) and query optimization
- Basic knowledge of cryptography and secure coding practices
- Experience with REST APIs and API security (OAuth2, JWT)

Bonus:
- Knowledge of PCI-DSS compliance
- Experience with financial APIs (RazorPay, Stripe, UPI)
- Understanding of double-entry bookkeeping systems

jds.title: Data Scientist – Product Analytics
jds.text:
We are looking for a Data Scientist to join our product analytics team. You will derive insights from user behavior data to drive product decisions.

Responsibilities:
- Build predictive models to forecast user behavior and retention
- Design and analyze A/B tests across product features
- Create dashboards and reports for leadership
- Work with engineering to instrument product analytics
- Identify growth opportunities through data exploration

Requirements:
- Bachelor's or Master's in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or related field
- Strong programming skills in Python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, matplotlib)
- Proficiency in SQL for complex data querying
- Experience with statistical analysis: hypothesis testing, regression, classification
- Familiarity with A/B testing methodology and experiment design
- Knowledge of data visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI, or Metabase)
- Experience with ML frameworks: scikit-learn, XGBoost

Bonus:
- Experience with Spark or distributed data processing
- Knowledge of causal inference methods
- Experience with cloud data warehouses (BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift)

jds.title: Data Analyst – Business Intelligence
jds.text:
Join our BI team to transform raw business data into clear, actionable insights that shape our strategy.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain BI dashboards using Tableau or Power BI
- Write complex SQL queries across large datasets
- Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand data needs
- Monitor KPIs and flag anomalies proactively
- Automate recurring reports and data pipelines

Requirements:
- Proficiency in SQL (window functions, CTEs, query optimization)
- Experience with BI tools: Tableau, Power BI, or Looker
- Python skills for data wrangling (pandas, openpyxl)
- Strong Excel/Google Sheets skills
- Ability to communicate technical findings to non-technical stakeholders
- Understanding of business metrics: CAC, LTV, churn, conversion

Good to Have:
- Experience with dbt for data transformation
- Knowledge of Google Analytics or Mixpanel
- Familiarity with cloud storage: S3, GCS

jds.title: Data Scientist – NLP / LLMs
jds.text:
We build AI products powered by large language models. Join us to push the frontier of applied NLP.

Responsibilities:
- Fine-tune and evaluate large language models for domain-specific tasks
- Build NLP pipelines for text classification, entity recognition, summarization
- Design prompts and RAG systems for production LLM applications
- Benchmark model performance and run ablation studies
- Collaborate with product to turn research into shipped features

Requirements:
- Strong Python skills
- Experience with HuggingFace Transformers library
- Understanding of transformer architecture, attention, BERT, GPT families
- Knowledge of fine-tuning methods: LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT
- Experience with LangChain or LlamaIndex for RAG pipelines
- Familiarity with vector databases: Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB
- Understanding of evaluation metrics: BLEU, ROUGE, perplexity, human eval

Bonus:
- Experience with OpenAI, Anthropic, or Gemini APIs
- Knowledge of RLHF and alignment techniques
- Published research or Kaggle competition experience

jds.title: Research Analyst – Investment Firm
jds.text:
Support our equity research team by building data-driven models and extracting insights from financial datasets.

Responsibilities:
- Build financial models and valuation analyses
- Collect and clean financial data from APIs and web sources
- Develop quantitative models for stock screening and portfolio analysis
- Prepare research reports and investment memos
- Monitor market trends and macroeconomic indicators

Requirements:
- Strong Python skills (pandas, numpy, matplotlib)
- Knowledge of financial markets, valuation methods (DCF, comparables)
- Experience with financial data APIs (Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg, Quandl)
- SQL proficiency for database querying
- Strong Excel and financial modeling skills
- Good written and verbal communication

Bonus:
- CFA Level 1 candidate or holder
- Experience with algorithmic trading concepts
- Knowledge of time series analysis

jds.title: ML Engineer – Recommendations
jds.text:
Build the ML systems that power personalized recommendations for 50M+ users.

Responsibilities:
- Design, train, and deploy recommendation models at scale
- Build feature engineering pipelines using Spark/Flink
- Implement A/B testing infrastructure for model evaluation
- Monitor model performance and handle data drift
- Optimize models for low-latency serving (< 20ms)

Requirements:
- Strong Python skills with ML libraries: PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn
- Experience with recommendation systems: collaborative filtering, matrix factorization, two-tower models
- Knowledge of MLOps: MLflow, Kubeflow, or SageMaker
- Experience with feature stores and data pipelines (Spark, Airflow)
- Understanding of model serving: TorchServe, TensorFlow Serving, Triton
- SQL and big data processing skills

Bonus:
- Experience with deep learning-based RecSys (DLRM, NCF)
- Knowledge of Kafka for real-time feature computation
- Contributions to open-source ML projects

jds.title: MLOps Engineer
jds.text:
Build the infrastructure and tooling that enables our data science team to ship models to production reliably.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain ML training and serving infrastructure
- Implement CI/CD pipelines for ML models
- Set up model monitoring and alerting for drift and degradation
- Manage GPU cluster resources for model training
- Containerize and orchestrate ML workloads with Docker and Kubernetes

Requirements:
- Strong Python and Bash scripting skills
- Experience with MLflow, DVC, or Weights & Biases for experiment tracking
- Knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, and Helm charts
- CI/CD experience: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or GitLab CI
- Cloud platform experience: AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, or Azure ML
- Understanding of model serving patterns and API design

Bonus:
- Experience with Terraform or Pulumi for infrastructure as code
- Knowledge of data version control and feature stores (Feast)
- Familiarity with Prometheus and Grafana for monitoring

jds.title: Computer Vision Engineer
jds.text:
Build perception systems for real-world autonomous applications.

Responsibilities:
- Develop object detection, segmentation, and tracking algorithms
- Train and optimize deep learning models for edge deployment
- Build data annotation pipelines and manage training datasets
- Optimize models for embedded hardware (NVIDIA Jetson, edge TPUs)
- Collaborate with robotics and hardware teams

Requirements:
- Strong Python skills
- Experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow for deep learning
- Knowledge of CV architectures: YOLO, ResNet, EfficientNet, ViT, SAM
- Experience with OpenCV for image processing
- Understanding of 3D vision: point clouds, depth estimation, LiDAR processing
- Familiarity with model optimization: ONNX, TensorRT, quantization, pruning

Bonus:
- Experience with ROS (Robot Operating System)
- Knowledge of SLAM algorithms
- Experience with synthetic data generation

jds.title: Applied AI Engineer – Generative AI
jds.text:
Build production-grade generative AI applications and the infrastructure behind them.

Responsibilities:
- Design and build RAG systems, agents, and LLM-powered workflows
- Optimize prompt engineering and context management strategies
- Integrate LLMs with external tools, APIs, and knowledge bases
- Evaluate and benchmark generative AI outputs
- Build guardrails and safety systems for production LLM apps

Requirements:
- Strong Python skills
- Experience with LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar orchestration frameworks
- Knowledge of vector databases: Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, pgvector
- Experience with OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, or Gemini APIs
- Understanding of embedding models and semantic search
- Familiarity with fine-tuning LLMs (LoRA, QLoRA)
- REST API development skills (FastAPI or Flask)

Bonus:
- Experience with function calling and tool use in LLMs
- Knowledge of multi-agent frameworks (AutoGen, CrewAI)
- Open source contributions in the AI/ML ecosystem

jds.title: Associate AI/ML Engineer (Application-focused)
jds.text:
Their extensive practical experience in building and deploying AI/ML models, including LLM integration and facial recognition, demonstrates readiness for application development.
Python
Machine Learning Fundamentals
LLM Integration
DeepFace
AWS EC2
Prompt Engineering

jds.title: DevOps Engineer – AWS
jds.text:
Join our platform engineering team to build and operate the cloud infrastructure powering our SaaS product.

Responsibilities:
- Design and manage AWS infrastructure using Terraform
- Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines for 20+ microservices
- Implement observability: logging, metrics, tracing (ELK, Prometheus, Grafana)
- Manage Kubernetes clusters (EKS) and Helm chart deployments
- Respond to incidents and drive postmortems

Requirements:
- Strong knowledge of AWS services: EC2, ECS/EKS, RDS, S3, Lambda, VPC, IAM
- Experience with Terraform or CloudFormation for IaC
- Proficiency in Docker and Kubernetes
- CI/CD experience: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or CircleCI
- Linux administration and Bash scripting skills
- Understanding of networking: DNS, load balancing, SSL/TLS

Bonus:
- AWS certifications (Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer)
- Experience with service mesh (Istio)
- Knowledge of GitOps with ArgoCD or Flux

jds.title: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
jds.text:
Maintain and improve the reliability, scalability, and performance of systems serving millions of requests per day.

Responsibilities:
- Define and track SLOs, SLIs, and error budgets
- Build automation to reduce toil and manual operations
- Lead incident response and blameless postmortems
- Capacity planning and performance tuning
- Collaborate with development teams to improve system reliability

Requirements:
- Software development skills in Python or Go
- Strong understanding of distributed systems and failure modes
- Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and container orchestration
- Observability expertise: Prometheus, Grafana, Jaeger, ELK stack
- On-call experience and incident management
- Linux system administration skills

Bonus:
- Experience with chaos engineering (Chaos Monkey, Gremlin)
- Knowledge of database replication and HA setups
- Background in software engineering

jds.title: Platform Engineer – Internal Developer Platform
jds.text:
Build the internal developer platform that lets our 200+ engineers ship faster and more reliably.

Responsibilities:
- Build self-service tooling for infrastructure provisioning
- Develop internal CLIs and developer portals (Backstage)
- Standardize and enforce golden paths for service creation
- Manage secrets and configuration management (Vault, AWS SSM)
- Build shared libraries and platform abstractions

Requirements:
- Strong Python or Go programming skills
- Kubernetes operator experience or custom controller development
- Terraform module design and management
- Understanding of developer experience and inner development loop
- Experience with Backstage or similar developer portals
- Knowledge of secrets management: HashiCorp Vault or AWS Secrets Manager

Bonus:
- Experience with platform engineering concepts (IDP, golden paths)
- Contributions to CNCF projects
- Knowledge of eBPF or kernel-level observability

jds.title: Frontend Engineer – React
jds.text:
Build beautiful, performant web experiences that delight our users.

Responsibilities:
- Build reusable React component libraries
- Implement pixel-perfect UI from Figma designs
- Optimize web performance (Core Web Vitals, bundle size)
- Write unit and integration tests with Jest and React Testing Library
- Collaborate with backend engineers on API integration

Requirements:
- Strong proficiency in React.js and TypeScript
- CSS expertise: Tailwind CSS, CSS-in-JS, animations
- State management experience: Redux Toolkit, Zustand, or React Query
- Experience with Next.js for SSR/SSG
- REST API and GraphQL integration experience
- Webpack/Vite bundler knowledge
- Git and GitHub collaboration skills

Bonus:
- Experience with Storybook for component documentation
- Knowledge of accessibility (WCAG 2.1)
- Familiarity with WebSocket or real-time data

jds.title: UI Engineer – Design Systems
jds.text:
Own and scale our design system used by 30+ product teams across the organization.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain a shared component library in React
- Define design tokens, theming, and accessibility standards
- Write comprehensive documentation and usage guidelines
- Review and merge contributions from product engineers
- Collaborate closely with the UX/design team

Requirements:
- Expert-level React and TypeScript skills
- Deep CSS knowledge: CSS variables, animations, responsive design
- Experience building component libraries published to npm
- Storybook experience for component documentation
- Strong understanding of accessibility (ARIA, WCAG)
- Design sensibility and ability to work with Figma

Bonus:
- Experience with Radix UI, shadcn/ui, or Headless UI
- Knowledge of Rollup or tsup for library bundling
- Open source contributions

jds.title: Associate Product Manager (APM)
jds.text:
Join our APM program to shape the direction of products used by millions.

Responsibilities:
- Define product requirements and write detailed PRDs
- Work with engineering and design to deliver features
- Analyze product metrics and define success criteria
- Conduct user research and synthesize insights
- Prioritize backlog and manage sprint planning

Requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in any discipline (CS preferred but not required)
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
- Excellent written and verbal communication
- Ability to work with data: SQL basics, Google Analytics, Mixpanel
- Experience with Jira, Confluence, or Notion for project management
- User empathy and customer-first thinking

Bonus:
- Previous internship in product, engineering, or consulting
- Experience with wireframing tools (Figma, Balsamiq)
- Knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodology

jds.title: Product Manager – Growth
jds.text:
Drive user acquisition, activation, and retention across our consumer application.

Responsibilities:
- Own growth KPIs: DAU, MAU, D7/D30 retention, activation rate
- Design and run growth experiments and A/B tests
- Build onboarding and referral loop optimizations
- Collaborate with marketing on paid and organic acquisition
- Analyze funnel data to identify drop-off points

Requirements:
- Experience with product metrics and funnel analysis
- Proficiency with analytics tools: Amplitude, Mixpanel, or Firebase
- Understanding of A/B testing and statistical significance
- SQL skills for self-serve data analysis
- Strong cross-functional collaboration skills
- Knowledge of growth frameworks (AARRR, Jobs to be Done)

Bonus:
- Experience with SEO/ASO
- Knowledge of viral loop design
- Background in data science or engineering

jds.title: Security Engineer – Application Security
jds.text:
Protect our products and users by embedding security into every stage of the development lifecycle.

Responsibilities:
- Perform security code reviews and threat modeling
- Run penetration tests on web and mobile applications
- Build and maintain SAST/DAST tooling in CI/CD pipelines
- Respond to and investigate security incidents
- Educate developers on secure coding practices

Requirements:
- Knowledge of OWASP Top 10 and web application vulnerabilities
- Experience with penetration testing tools: Burp Suite, Metasploit, Nmap
- Scripting skills in Python or Bash
- Understanding of cryptography, PKI, and TLS
- Familiarity with cloud security: AWS IAM, Security Groups, KMS
- Knowledge of compliance standards: SOC 2, ISO 27001

Bonus:
- CEH, OSCP, or similar certifications
- Experience with bug bounty programs
- Knowledge of mobile security (Android/iOS)

jds.title: SOC Analyst – Threat Detection
jds.text:
Monitor and protect our enterprise environment from cyber threats.

Responsibilities:
- Monitor SIEM alerts and investigate security events
- Perform malware analysis and incident response
- Write detection rules and playbooks
- Threat hunt across endpoint, network, and cloud telemetry
- Maintain and tune security tools

Requirements:
- Understanding of cyber kill chain and MITRE ATT&CK framework
- Experience with SIEM tools: Splunk, Microsoft Sentinel, or QRadar
- Knowledge of networking protocols: TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP, TLS
- Basic scripting: Python or PowerShell
- Familiarity with EDR solutions: CrowdStrike, SentinelOne, Defender
- Log analysis and correlation skills

Bonus:
- CompTIA Security+, CySA+, or GCIH certification
- Experience in digital forensics
- Knowledge of cloud security monitoring

jds.title: Quantitative Analyst – Algo Trading
jds.text:
Develop and deploy systematic trading strategies using quantitative methods.

Responsibilities:
- Research and develop alpha signals using market microstructure data
- Backtest trading strategies with rigorous statistical validation
- Implement real-time execution algorithms in C++ or Python
- Analyze P&L attribution and risk metrics
- Collaborate with engineers to deploy strategies to production

Requirements:
- Strong mathematics: statistics, linear algebra, probability, stochastic calculus
- Programming proficiency in Python and C++
- Understanding of financial markets and instruments
- Experience with time series analysis and signal processing
- Backtesting framework experience
- Strong statistical intuition and hypothesis testing

Bonus:
- Knowledge of market microstructure
- Experience with order book data
- Research publications or Kaggle competition wins
